behavior_in_task_description.reason: Both files and functions are named in instruction.md (weight_utils.py:initialize_single_dummy_weight, test_basic_correctness.py:test_compile_correctness), and tests inspect exactly those.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bugs (missing int init, duplicate append, *3 multiplier, missing env append in inductor loop) without dictating the exact replacement code.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check matching lengths, non-empty pairs, and zeroed int params on ROCm — any correct fix using zero_()/torch.zeros_like and balanced list appends would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests AST-extract and execute initialize_single_dummy_weight and test_compile_correctness with mocks to observe real behavior/calls.

test_not_tautological.reason: Anti-stub checks require -cc.mode= flags with >=2 distinct modes and inductor backend calls, preventing trivial no-op stubs.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Both root causes (int zeroing on ROCm, list-length balancing, inductor non-dead code) are covered by individual tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped by section headers (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass, Anti-stub) with docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code-fix, not structured-data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and function names are consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to approximate line numbers and functions, which is acceptable localization guidance without giving exact replacement code.
